Journal.Title: Zhongguo xiu fu chong jian wai ke za zhi = Zhongguo xiufu chongjian waike zazhi = Chinese journal of reparative and reconstructive surgery
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Zhongguo Xiu Fu Chong Jian Wai Ke Za Zhi

Article.ArticleTitle: [Impact of tibial tunnel position in artificial posterior cruciate ligament reconstruction on postoperative knee function and stability].

Abstract.AbstractText: To investigate the impact of tibial tunnel position on postoperative knee function and stability in patients undergoing artificial posterior cruciate ligament (PCL) reconstruction.

A retrospective analysis was conducted on patients who underwent single knee artificial PCL reconstruction between January 2018 and September 2024 and met the inclusion criteria. Based on postoperative three-dimensional (3D)-CT measurements of the tibial tunnel position, the patients were allocated into a low tunnel group ( n=35) and a high tunnel group ( n=30). Except for gender, there was no significant difference between groups ( P>0.05) in age, body mass index, injury side, time from injury to operation, preoperative posterior drawer test grade, knee range of motion (ROM), Tegner score, Lysholm score, International Knee Documentation Committee (IKDC) score, or the composition ratio of combined meniscus and cartilage injuries. The tibial tunnel positions were compared. Postoperative recovery of knee function was evaluated using the IKDC score, Lysholm score, Tegner score, and knee ROM. The differences between pre- and post-operative values (change values) for these indicators were calculated and compared between groups. Posterior knee stability was assessed using the posterior drawer test and the side-to-side difference (SSD) in tibial posterior translation measured on stress radiographs. Patient satisfaction was evaluated using the visual analogue scale (VAS) score. Postoperative complications such as graft failure were recorded.

The relative proximal-distal position of the tibial tunnel was significantly lower in the low tunnel group than in the high tunnel group ( P<0.05), while no significant difference was found in the relative medial-lateral position between groups ( P>0.05). All operations were successfully completed, and incisions healed by first intention. All patients were followed up 12-86 months, with a median follow-up of 23.0 months. The low tunnel group demonstrated superior posterior stability compared to the high tunnel group, showing a significantly lower SSD and lower posterior drawer test grade at last follow-up ( P<0.05). At last follow-up, the change value in the Tegner score and the VAS score for patient satisfaction were significantly higher in the low tunnel group than in the high tunnel group ( P<0.05). No significant difference was found between groups in the change values for IKDC score, Lysholm score, or knee ROM ( P>0.05). Two patients in the high tunnel group underwent revision surgery due to graft failure, whereas no such adverse events occurred in the low tunnel group. The difference in the incidence of complications between groups was not significant ( P>0.05).

Compared with a high tibial tunnel, the low tibial tunnel technique can effectively reduce the graft's turning angle at the proximal tibia and lower the risk of graft failure, thereby significantly improving posterior knee stability and function recovery after artificial PCL reconstruction.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Sports Medicine, Qilu Hospital of Shandong University (the First Clinical College of Shandong University), Jinan Shandong, 250012, P. R. China.
Department of Sports Medicine, Qilu Hospital of Shandong University (the First Clinical College of Shandong University), Jinan Shandong, 250012, P. R. China.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Zhongguo Xiu Fu Chong Jian Wai Ke Za Zhi

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 探讨人工后交叉韧带（posterior cruciate ligament，PCL）重建术中胫骨骨道位置对术后膝关节功能及稳定性的影响。.

回顾分析2018年1月—2024年9月收治且符合选择标准的单膝PCL重建患者临床资料。根据术后三维CT测量胫骨骨道位置，将患者分为低位骨道组（ n=35）与高位骨道组（ n=30）。两组患者性别差异有统计学意义（ P<0.05），年龄、身体质量指数、损伤侧别、受伤至手术时间及术前后抽屉试验分级、膝关节活动度、Tegner 评分、Lysholm 评分、国际膝关节文献委员会（IKDC）评分、合并半月板及软骨损伤构成比等基线资料比较，差异均无统计学意义（ P>0.05）。比较两组胫骨骨道出口位置。以IKDC评分、Lysholm 评分、Tegner 评分、膝关节活动度评价膝关节功能恢复情况，计算上述指标手术前后差值（变化值）进行组间比较。使用后抽屉试验和基于X线片测量双膝胫骨后移差异（side-to-side difference，SSD）评估膝关节稳定性。采用视觉模拟评分（VAS）评价患者满意度。观察术后移植失败等并发症发生情况。.

低位骨道组胫骨骨道近远端相对位置低于高位骨道组，差异有统计学意义（ P<0.05）；两组胫骨骨道内外侧相对位置差异无统计学意义（ P>0.05）。两组手术均顺利完成，切口均Ⅰ期愈合。患者均获随访，随访时间 12～86 个月，中位时间23.0 个月。低位骨道组膝关节后向稳定性优于高位骨道组，末次随访时SSD及后抽屉试验分级均更低，差异均有统计学意义（ P<0.05）。末次随访时，低位骨道组Tegner评分变化值、患者满意度VAS评分优于高位骨道组，差异有统计学意义（ P<0.05）；两组IKDC评分、Lysholm评分及膝关节活动度的变化值差异均无统计学意义（ P>0.05）。高位骨道组2例移植失败进行翻修手术，低位骨道组无相关不良事件发生，并发症发生率组间差异无统计学意义（ P>0.05）。.
相较于高位骨道，选择低位胫骨骨道能有效减小移植物在胫骨近端的转弯角度，降低移植物失效风险，从而显著提升人工PCL重建术后膝关节后向稳定性与运动功能水平。.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: 利益冲突 在课题研究和文章撰写过程中不存在利益冲突
